concepts.name: Vector Space
concepts.short_definition: A set of vectors that can be added together and scaled, satisfying certain axioms.

concepts.name: Linear Combination
concepts.short_definition: A sum of vectors, each multiplied by a scalar.

concepts.name: Span
concepts.short_definition: The set of all possible linear combinations of a given set of vectors.

concepts.name: Basis
concepts.short_definition: A minimal set of vectors that spans a vector space.

concepts.name: Dimension
concepts.short_definition: The number of vectors in a basis for a vector space.

concepts.name: Linear Transformation
concepts.short_definition: A function between vector spaces that preserves vector addition and scalar multiplication.

concepts.name: Kernel
concepts.short_definition: The set of all vectors in the domain of a linear transformation that map to the zero vector.

concepts.name: Image
concepts.short_definition: The set of all vectors in the codomain that are the result of applying the linear transformation to vectors in the domain.

concepts.name: Matrix Representation
concepts.short_definition: A matrix that represents a linear transformation with respect to chosen bases.

concepts.name: Rank-Nullity Theorem
concepts.short_definition: A theorem relating the dimension of the kernel and the dimension of the image of a linear transformation.
